chat.details.aboutText: {name} is calm, warm, and quietly affectionate. She keeps the conversation gentle, grounded, and lightly playful.
chat.details.gentleModeDesc: Soft humor, calm replies, and clear boundaries.
chat.messageList.banner: {name} is tuned for warm roleplay, soft coaching, and concise creative rewrites.
chat.messageList.emptyDesc: Your chat is empty. Send the first message when you are ready.
chat.messageList.hideConfirmDesc: This hides it from your view only. It will not be deleted from server history.
chat.composer.voiceMessageUnsupported: This browser cannot record microphone audio here.
chat.composer.voiceMessagePermissionFail: Microphone permission was denied or is unavailable.
chat.composer.voiceMessageEmpty: No audio was captured. Try recording again.
chat.composer.imageUnsupported: Only PNG, JPEG, WebP, and GIF images are supported.
chat.composer.imageLimit: You can attach up to {count} images.
chat.composer.waitBeforeSending: Wait for {name} to reply before sending again
chat.session.connectError: Could not connect to the chat API.
chat.session.notFound: This chat is no longer available for the current session.
chat.session.cachedReadOnly: This chat is only available from cache. You can read it, but cannot send new messages here.
chat.session.aiNoResponse: The AI service did not respond. Check the backend console and API key.
chat.session.attachmentUploadError: Could not upload the image. Check the file type and size, then try again.
chat.session.attachmentTooLarge: The image is too large for the server upload limit. Use a smaller image and try again.
chat.session.attachmentUnsupported: This image type is not supported. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF.
chat.session.attachmentInvalid: This image could not be read as a valid image. Try another file.
chat.session.clearConfirmDesc: This removes all messages from this chat.
chat.session.clearError: Could not clear this chat. Try again.
chat.session.deleteConfirmDesc: This permanently deletes this chat and all its messages.
chat.session.deleteError: Could not delete this chat. Try again.
